name: second-brain
description: Second Brain tools for the cognitive-exoskeleton era. Five skills: (1) Second Brain Setup & Audit — builds or audits the five-folder Layer-1 substrate using the Three Brains framework and operation-readiness diagnostics; (2) Knowledge Distill — URL or YouTube transcript fetched via Tavily, distilled into key ideas, wikilinked, routed to the right KB subfolder with thinker profiles; (3) Knowledge Archive — preserves full article text with a summary header, supports single-URL, paste-in, and bulk publication feed modes with date filtering and last-scraped tracking; (4) Second Brain Connect — runs the 9 cognitive operations (Simmons: Analogical, Abductive, Counterfactual, Falsification, Bayesian, First Principles, Dialectical, Systems, Perspective) against vault clusters and returns connection proposals for human approval; (5) Framework Extractor — turns books, courses, and frameworks into structured Claude Cowork Skills and plugins via a 5-phase decode-build-audit-architect workflow.
